issue_body: ### Symfony version(s) affected 7.4.0 7.4.6 ### Description Im having issues with my forms getting duplicate "NotBlank" (probably other constraints as well) validation errors when posting a form. I can reproduce the same issue in two different projects (both are Pimcore v12.3.3 projects) but to me it does not feel like the issues is related to Pimcore since no Pimcore code is involved regarding the forms. ### How to reproduce 1. Create a TestController with a indexAction 2. Index action should generate a simple form with a name field with a "NotBlank" constraint 3. Add a view which simply prints the form 4. Visit the controllers URL and submit an empty form ### Additional Context HTML result after POST shows each validation error appearing twice: ```html Error This value should not be blank. Error This value should not be blank. ``` Expected: Each constraint violation should only be reported once. Actual: Each constraint violation message appears twice in the rendered form.
